Global (All).title: Conflict between Ukraine and Russia escalates; concerns over global food security
Global (All).summary: The conflict between Ukraine and Russia has resulted in significant disruptions to global food supplies, leading to food shortages and price increases.

Global (All).title: Mass protests erupt in Peru amid fuel price hike and economic instability
Global (All).summary: Protests in Peru have turned violent as citizens express discontent with the government's decision to hike fuel prices, leading to economic instability and social unrest.

Global (All).title: COVID-19 variant XBB sparks concerns of potential new wave in multiple countries
Global (All).summary: The emergence of a new COVID-19 variant, XBB, has raised concerns of a potential new wave of infections, particularly in regions with low vaccination rates and high case numbers.

United States.title: Ukraine war: White House says Russia's missile strikes on Poland were 'unacceptable'.
Biden to visit the US-Mexico border as part of trip to focus on migration.
US to host 'diplomatic meetings' with Chinese officials, Blinken to return for Asia tour.

South Korea.title: Seoul Seeks to Curb Crypto Activity Amidst Market Plunge
South Korea.summary: South Korea's government has announced plans to tighten regulations on cryptocurrency trading, citing concerns over market volatility and potential risks to investors.

South Korea.title: NKorea Condemns S Korea-US Joint Military Drill
South Korea.summary: North Korea has condemned the joint military drill between South Korea and the United States, calling it a 'provocative' move that could escalate tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

South Korea.title: S Korea's Ex-President Park Geun-Hye Sentenced to Extra 4 Years
South Korea.summary: South Korea's former President Park Geun-hye has been sentenced to an additional 4 years in prison for corruption and abuse of power, bringing her total sentence to 22 years.

Japan.title: Rising tensions between Japan and South Korea over historic grievances
Japan.summary: Recent statements from Japanese and South Korean leaders have heightened tensions over historical issues, increasing the risk of diplomatic fallout and economic repercussions.

Japan.title: Cybersecurity concerns regarding the use of Chinese-made surveillance cameras in Japan
Japan.summary: Japanese authorities have expressed concerns over the potential use of Chinese-made surveillance cameras to collect sensitive information, raising fears of data breaches and cyberespionage.

Japan.title: Protests against government's handling of COVID-19 response continue
Japan.summary: Small protests have taken place in Tokyo and other cities, with participants voicing frustration over the government's handling of the pandemic, including mask mandates and vaccination requirements.
